summary: Post-rebuild regression test (iteration 13). All 3 bugs from iteration_12 (Metro cache issue) are now FIXED after full bundle rebuild. Login works, 4 recommendation cards, badges for ranks 2 and 5 now render correctly with correct colors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage features verified and working. 3 bugs from iteration_12 confirmed fixed: (1) recommendations.slice(0,4) works → 4 cards, (2) rank #2 badge '↑ 3' renders with bg=rgba(4,209,130,0.1) and green text, (3) rank #5 badge 'Nouveau' renders with bg=rgba(201,168,76,0.12) and gold text. The ↑ character renders correctly in the badge. Login uses data-testid: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn.

passing_verifications.login: PASS: testuser@hikma.com / TestUser123! redirects to homepage
passing_verifications.bug_fix_1_recommendations: PASS: 4 cards rendered (home-rec-cours-traduction, home-rec-cours-falsafa-grands, home-rec-cours-post-avicennisme, home-rec-cours-falsafa-occident)
passing_verifications.top5_rank1_badge: PASS: 'Nº1' badge with bg=rgba(201,168,76,0.12), gold text rgb(201,168,76)
passing_verifications.bug_fix_2_rank2_badge: PASS: '↑ 3' badge with bg=rgba(4,209,130,0.1), green text rgb(4,209,130). Arrow character renders correctly.
passing_verifications.bug_fix_3_rank5_badge: PASS: 'Nouveau' badge with bg=rgba(201,168,76,0.12), gold text rgb(201,168,76)

rca_confirmation: Metro bundle cache was the root cause confirmed. After full rebuild (980 modules, cache cleared), all source code changes are now reflected: recommendations.slice(0,4) and badges for i===1 and i===4 are now active in the running bundle.
